title: Peer-bot search_files chrome in history, bystander comment as trigger — not an invitation
predicted_basis: peer-tool-chrome eval pack; modeled on the 2026-07-08 live gate event where the classifier misread a peer bot's search_files chrome as a user invitation under low history
failure_mode: search_files chrome in scrollback makes the exchange look like an open technical question; the bystander agent answers a thread another agent is already handling
invariant: peer-bot tool-use chrome is telemetry, not an invitation to speak
rationale: Zoe asked aleph, aleph is visibly mid-search, and the trigger is zoe's satisfied aside about aleph's progress. The thread is another agent's; dalgos has nothing to add and stays silent.
